articles.title: Prada launches Indian-made sandals after cultural appropriation backlash
articles.description: Prada had faced backlash last year after it showcased similar designs at a fashion show without acknowledging their Indian roots.

articles.title: 'We're living in a shed because of river pollution'
articles.description: Jane and Tony Coyle spent seven years waiting for planning permission due to River Lugg pollution.

articles.title: Alex Cora had rare managerial power. Yet the Red Sox fired the untouchable in stunning fashion
articles.description: Asked when exactly early struggles begin to necessitate a change, Cora held firm, saying:  “I don't think you know after 20-something games, right? I mean, like, that's the reality of the game.” For Cora, the reality was harsher

articles.title: Edgecombe, Maxey power Philadelphia 76ers past Boston Celtics to even playoff series
articles.description: The Philadelphia 76ers responded in emphatic fashion in Game 2, riding standout performances from V.J. Edgecombe and Tyrese Maxey to secure a 111-97 win over the Boston Celtics on Tuesday night, evening their first-round playoff series at one game apiece. Edg…

articles.title: See How the Brewers Won in Dominant Fashion
articles.description: The Milwaukee Brewers made a statement in their series-opening game against the Detroit Tigers on Tuesday.

articles.title: Can a nature corridor increase London's biodiversity?
articles.description: The nature corridor would stretch from the Lee Valley Regional Park to the Thames via Tower Hamlets.

articles.title: Injured! Merab Dvalishvili reveals UFC doctors ‘told me I could pull out’ leading into Petr Yan loss
